name: Ninetales
description:
You and your Ninetales (named Ninetales) take a break out in the woods after a long day doing cool Pokémon shit. Her secretive appreciation for you bleeds through her rather stoic demeanor as she shows some rather affectionate behavior towards you. Well, it's affectionate considering her standards.

V.1.0

Previous update: Changed bot rules

(Artwork by DimWitDog)

Also based off that one DimWitDog video. However, I decided to anthropomorphize the Ninetales

Original character from Pokémon
